channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: How Israel targeted and killed Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil
item.description: Amal Khalil was killed while reporting on an Israeli air strike in southern Lebanon during a 10-day ceasefire.

item.title: US has three aircraft carriers in the Middle East for first time since 2003
item.description: As tensions ramp up amid fragile truce, US military says it 'redirected' 34 vessels as part of blockade on Iran's ports.

item.title: PM Sanchez rebuffs US idea of suspending Spain from NATO
item.description: PM Sanchez responded to reports that the US may suspend Madrid from NATO over its opposition to the war on Iran.

item.title: Iran-Iraq Tanker War redux? Why the Strait of Hormuz crisis is different
item.description: The Tanker War between Iran and Iraq in the 1980s also disrupted global shipping. But the situation today is different.

item.title: Iranians bring music to sites devastated by US-Israeli attacks
item.description: Iranian musicians perform on city streets and venture to sites devastated in US-Israeli attacks.

item.title: US Navy authorised to target Iranian fast boats in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Hegseth says President Trump authorised the navy to target Iranian fast boats in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iranian FM Araghchi to visit Pakistan in step towards US talks resumption
item.description: As Pakistan hosts US-Iran talks, twin-city residents face road closures, halted courts and growing economic strain.

item.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
item.description: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

item.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
item.description: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

item.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
item.description: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.
